hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/enforce-handoff-naming.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; echo "[saas-startup-team] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'

bash -c 'p=scripts/check-regression-test.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; echo "[saas-startup-team] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
hooks.description: Block `gh pr merge` for an incident-linked PR unless the diff adds a regression test (or an explicit override is recorded)

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/auto-learn.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; cat >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "[saas-startup-team] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
hooks.description: Auto-extract project learnings from handoff/review/signoff files into CLAUDE.md

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/validate-json.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; cat >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "[saas-startup-team] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
hooks.description: Validate JSON syntax after editing .json files

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/enforce-delegation.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; cat >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "[saas-startup-team] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/auto-commit.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; cat >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "[saas-startup-team] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
